verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Nobody knows how weak I am better than you Nobody sees all of my needs better than you Nobody has the power to change me to what I was born to be Jesus be strong in my weakness, Empower me

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Empower me Like a rushing river flowing to the sea Lord, send your holy spirit flowing out through me Til i'm living as your child victorious and free Send the power of your love empower me

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Nobody's eyes see through my soul better than yours Nobody's love can make me whole no love but yours Nobody has the power to lift me to reach for eternity Jesus break through all my defences empower me
